final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original infographic explaining the definitions of and relationships between 7 AI-related concepts.

Style/medium: needs a hand-drawn illustration aesthetic — exact line weight, texture, and sketch style is yours
Composition: must be a single-panel infographic layout with all 7 concepts clearly separated and visually connected by relationship lines or arrows
Subject: must include all 7 concepts with definitions and relationship annotations:
  - AI（人工智能）
  - MCP（Model Context Protocol）
  - AI Agent
  - OpenClaw
  - AI Skill
  - 蒸馏（Distillation）
  - CLI（Command Line Interface）
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a friendly, approachable atmosphere — exact warmth level is yours
Color palette: needs a light, easy-to-read direction — exact color choices are yours
Materials/textures: needs a hand-drawn / sketchbook surface treatment — exact paper texture and ink style is yours
Text (verbatim): must include the following labels verbatim: "AI", "MCP", "AI Agent", "OpenClaw", "AI Skill", "蒸馏", "CLI"
Constraints: must preserve all 7 concepts; each concept must have a short definition annotation; relationship arrows or connectors between related concepts must be visible; layout must be readable and uncluttered
Avoid: must avoid dense academic diagram style, dark backgrounds, overly technical flowchart aesthetics
